Package index

All functions

as_tibble.kagi_results() as_tibble.kagi_search_results()
Convert Kagi results to a tibble
build_kagi_query()
Build a Kagi search query string
kagi_enrich_once()
Perform a Kagi enrichment in one call
kagi_hits()
Extract search hits from Kagi search results
kagi_meta()
Extract metadata from Kagi results
kagi_perform()
Execute a Kagi API request
kagi_related()
Extract related searches from Kagi results
kagi_search_once()
Perform a Kagi search in one call
kagi_summarize_once()
Perform a Kagi summarization in one call
new_kagi_connection()
Construct a Kagi API connection
new_kagi_enrich()
Create a new Kagi enrich request
new_kagi_enrich_results()
Construct enrich results object
new_kagi_search()
Create a new Kagi search request
new_kagi_search_results()
Construct search results object
new_kagi_summarize()
Create a new Kagi summarize request
new_kagi_summarize_results()
Construct summarize results object
open_kagi_query()
Open a Kagi search in the browser
